reviews.review_title: Cool, but not friendly for beginners.
reviews.review_description: I like the design and concept of the game and look forward to fully finishing it. Now some problems I keep on facing is having to repeat the same frase over and over again devs please eather make it more accepting or better yet show us where we pronounced it wrong that way it's both easier and way less frustrating. Also there isn't that much grammer and explanations that go in depth of the language some small guides would be best. Now  People thinking of buy it I think it's best if you already know Japanese as I don't thing this will fit well with people who are clueless.

I really love this game and learned a lot and made it to the second level in one day. I just don’t understand how to save it so I don’t have to go back to the first level. That’s the only thing I see wrong with the game is that it needs something so that you can save the levels that you have already done? If you could do that, I would give you a five star.

Saving issues aside ( please add a manual save feature ) I’m a college mandarin student, so while I’m not perfect I know my tones pretty well , and I know I’m saying words correctly that I use daily in school and the microphone is still turning them back as incorrect … especially with a tonal languag like mandarin , you guys gotta loosen the microphone up a little it gets frustrating repeating  a word I know I’mSaying correctly over and over  … mondly has it done with   balance check that app out for guidance

Edit- I joined the Discord Server and it was no help solving the issues in the game that you say can be explained. Seems lots of comments if having to start game over because of bugs. Currently stuck in desert for months game won't let me move forward. I completed everything but can't take portal back. No one wants to play a game that makes them have to start from scratch after spending hours playing. If there were walkthroughs beyond the school yard I would maybe know not what to do the 2nd time around to avoid whatever glitch is in the game. Maybe add a fast travel back to the school from the watch. Might solve the getting stuck in other levels unable to get out. 

This game reminds me of Hogwarts Legacy in some ways. It is visually stunning. It makes learning spanish fun. I do wish there was a manual save feature because I have had a few times where I hit glitches and had to close out of the game and go back in so I could continue. Example: I dropped the paper clue from the first chest in the game and it fell on floor. Nothing I did would let me retrieve it. I had to restart game and the game didn't autosave anything I had done. The next glitch occurred in the garden when caretaker asked me to take care of the kids leaving trash everywhere. I went to talk to the boys and the game microphone wouldn't pop up for me to record my response. I had to close out again and go back in for it to work. The third glitch I ran into was the girl in the park that asks for you to find parts of her broken wand. One of the pieces was on a park bench. Nothing I did would let me pick it up. My glove would go into bench and get stuck.  Pointing at it only lit up the bench. I still can't retrieve things from a distance. I have to make myself small "crouch" then pick them up. That didn't work either. When I try to pick up things from distance a blue thread comes off glove but doesn't always attach to what I am pointing at and even if it does, the item doesn't come to my hand. I really hope all the little bugs get fixed because this game is pretty awesome to play. Adding control instructions as part of guide would be a nice touch too.

developer_response.body:
Hi GlitterSpaklePony, we really appreciate your feedback. Many of the "glitches" you point out can be explained! Would you like to join our Discord server and explain those issues into more detail? Thank you! 
https://discord.gg/9T6wkXzg

reviews.review_title: Need the ability to review tutorials
reviews.review_description: Enjoying the game and no crashes, yay! Cannot figure out for the life of me how to complete a duel. I'm sure the was a tutorial I missed and I cannot seem to find the right combination of buttons to lock in my answers. It's frustrating I have to use the run option to bypass the duels when I know the answer. I'm still trying to relearn how to grab objects from a distance. Could really use a wiki or menu option to see the tutorials again.

This game has really made learning fun, which makes me play more, then I learn more which makes me want to play more again :D
I hope this game keeps receiving updates and giving more content! :D

After having left a one star review due to an issue I ran into with the recent updates of the game, I am changing my review to 5 stars. The developers quickly reached out and worked through the problems, which resulted in finding a big bug that they were able to quickly fix not just for myself but for everyone. I was impressed by how fast they worked and how kind they were.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your help and your kind words!

reviews.review_description:
Enjoying the game, liking the fact your are learning while playing.
Keep up the good work.
They are not following along with what the prompt is having me read.

developer_response.body: We are constantly hearing community feedback and polishing as much as we can. If you want to share some insights please join our discord server! https://discord.gg/dGjW8pJy

reviews.review_description: I had been out of this game for last couple weeks due to the coming out of something else lol but I went back to it in the last week or so and something is wrong with the maneuverability at least on my game. Teleport is non-existent now, and And when it's set to movement I have random movement of my character it just walks automatically I don't have any control and it makes it very frustrating and difficult to navigate the game so I called it quits. Hopefully if they update it will fix but right now I can't even play the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Shibumikg! really glad to hear that you are enjoying Terra Allia so far! but at the same time, I'm kinda concerned about your issue, it's very odd as It hasn't been reported previously, nor we have been able to reproduce that issue. Would you be so kind to join our discord server so we can discuss it further?  https://discord.gg/rPGewSfM

Have you already check the latest update?

reviews.review_description: You're paying to play a demo, not worth buying. Probably only 15 to 20 mins. Not much common words you would use if you're trying to learn a different language to use on the regular. Concept is good but needs to be improved game length and more practical real world words to learn that language before buying.

developer_response.body: Hey Latin. K! Have you already check the latest update?

reviews.review_description:
I am a linguist at heart, and, as such, I love the concept of this game. The execution thus far, however, is lacking. 

1) The microphone kept glitching. It would freeze or disappear and not let me speak. It became very frustrating. 

2) The sound to let you know someone to battle is within eyesight is very jarring.  I would like it if we could change it to something gentler and / or quieter. It would also be nice to be able to shut it off entirely and just have the visual notification. 

3) The falcon battle simply would not work for me. Granted, I may have been doing something wrong on this one, but even so, I would say that the lack of clear and concise instruction would be to blame. I simply ignored that function altogether. 

4) I was disappointed to find out it was unfinished and was complete so quickly. I understand you have more coming with free DLC, but in order to progress on a language, you have to practice regularly. I will have to replay the same scenes over and over or wait and risk losing any progress I made. 

5) There were multiple times when the romanization was very different than the Hangul. I understand trying to make it make sense to a native English speaker, but some were just completely different words, and some were written in Hangul, then English, and then the audio was something else entirely! As a student, that's frustrating. 

6) As a student, I would like to not only memorize words but also learn grammar and sentence structure. It would be more useful in real life. 

I have more, but really, who's gonna read all of this anyway. 

Overall, it was an ok experience.  Though, it did feel rushed for release. I await your updates and hope for the best. This idea is fire! I just need you guys to work on the follow-through.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! thank you for playing and for the input! Coming up with this type of app mixing learning and playing is difficult and a novel territory especially in VR, that's why we are constantly evolving and updating and hearing our community! because of that, you gave some valuable feedback but it would be great if you could give some examples. Would you consider joining our Discord server and giving us a little more insight? Here is the link: https://discord.gg/Zbk3eZDp

Have you already check the latest update?

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this game. I think it is engaging and set up in a way that makes learning a new language fun. That being said I just paid 20 bucks for the first level. Why are you releasing a game if it isn't complete?

developer_response.body:
Hey Spidey1211! We are very happy to hear that you enjoyed the game, that being said the game is planned to be updated with new chapters and levels in the next months! (all for free). If you want to know more about it or to give us feedback directly (that feedback might make it into the next chapter!) would you like to join our discord server? here is the link! https://discord.gg/3rsvbFVm
(BTW, the "rest" is already available! Have you tried?

reviews.review_description: This is a good game but it keeps crashing on me. Every time I try to leave the school to go into the town for the first time the game crashes on me. I have un installed and re installed to see if that fixes it but it still doesn't. I don't know if that is where the game currently ends or not but I would like to keep going.

developer_response.body: Hi NickelJay, It's very unfortunate to hear you are having that kind of issue, we would like to have more info on it, could you join our discord server so we can check in more detail? https://discord.gg/2T78MbcF Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
It's really great for learning vocab.
There are sentences but I so far only have seen the nouns being in my book of words.
The scenery is blurry a bit. It gets clearer if you walk right up to a person. Please fix this.

developer_response.body: Hi there! thank you for the feedback, I think that what you noticed about the "blurry" scenario might be related to a technology we used called ASW that improves the frame rate in the most dense scenes. We are fixing it! we are optimizing even more our game to remove the use of ASW from every scene so stay tuned for the next update!

reviews.review_description: This is the most fun I ever had trying to learn a new language! I use it to consolidate my Spanish and japanese vocabulary and it works wonders.
I really liked the only part of the game that was playable. Not interested in the multi player part. I would like to finish the storyline.

I'm in love with this game! The environments, the magical feeling, the way it combines basic language with spells and puzzles

I'm playing English to Japanese and I'm already looking forward to try differents language combinations!!

I love this game but I can play only one time. I played yesterday and today, when I start the game, the Continue button is grey. If I click on Load Game button then Continue, nothing is happening. How can I be reimbursed?

developer_response.body:
Hey Jacques, it looks like you probably didn't finish the tutorial part of the game in the professor's office. Is that the case? the game only saves when you finish that part. If that's not the case, why don't you give us a little more insight on our discord server, it would be very helpful.
https://discord.gg/4nH479jN

Have you already check the latest update?

reviews.review_description: Fun way to learn languages. Hope it wil be available in Dutch (Belgium) language.
